seedTasks.prompt: Fix a Tailwind mobile form whose sticky action bar covers the final controls. Preserve the existing visual direction.

assertions.text: The change stays bounded to implementation and does not invent a new direction.
The primary action and final controls are reachable at 390px without hidden overflow.
Focus and loading behavior do not resize or obscure controls.

seedTasks.prompt: Repair a shadcn/Tailwind billing table with wrapping filters, clipped row actions, and unfinished empty/error states while preserving semantic tokens.

assertions.text: Existing semantic tokens and component variants are reused.
No page-level horizontal overflow or unreachable row action remains.
Loading, empty, error, and selected states are verified.

seedTasks.prompt: Fix a Tailwind v4 component whose dynamically constructed color classes are missing from production and whose local variants conflict.

assertions.text: Dynamic construction is replaced by complete static class mappings.
Conflicting utilities are removed without raw-color token drift.
Rendered variants and focus states pass runtime verification.

seedTasks.prompt: Polish a Tailwind app that has local CSS variables and custom primitives but no shadcn setup. Do not introduce shadcn assumptions.

assertions.text: The project archetype is identified before changes.
Local variables and primitives are preserved without unnecessary extraction.
Changed states pass mobile and desktop browser checks.

seedTasks.prompt: Repair a dense Tailwind analytics toolbar with long translated labels, filters, and actions from 390px through desktop.

assertions.text: Long labels and translated content have an intentional wrapping or overflow strategy.
Primary and secondary actions remain distinguishable and reachable.
No clipped controls, sticky overlap, or state-driven layout shift remains.
